title: Accounting String Formats
description: The details of accounting string formats.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the accounting string format.

delimiter.title: Delimiter
delimiter.description: The delimiter that separates the accounting components within an accounting string.

components.title: Components
components.description: The accounting string components that make a valid accounting string along with their position within that string

component.title: Component
component.description: An accounting string component that is part of a valid accounting string.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Component.

order.title: Order
order.description: The position of the accounting component within a valid accounting string.
